use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons for SaaS landing pages and marketing sites
Interactive product buttons in e-commerce checkout flows
Feature activation buttons in fintech dashboard interfaces
Publish or submit actions in creator tools and content platforms
Build or deploy triggers in developer tool interfaces
ai_summary: A sleek animated button component featuring a continuous shimmering effect that sweeps across the text using CSS masks and Framer Motion. The button uses glass-morphism styling with backdrop blur, gradient borders, and dark mode support with subtle glow effects on hover. Includes spring-based scale animations on tap and shadow transitions, making it ideal for high-end SaaS, fintech, and product interfaces requiring polished interactive elements.
